testsuite.name: me.owldev.adsignage.domain.assignment.DeviceControllerTest

testcase.name: PATCH returns 404 when device id is unknown()
PATCH on never-assigned device with restaurantId inserts first active row()
PATCH returns 404 when restaurant id is unknown()
PATCH device with restaurantId remaps and returns 200 with new active assignment()
PATCH returns 400 when body has no actionable fields()
PATCH returns 422 when screenName is provided ahead of schema support()
PATCH returns 400 when restaurantId is sent as blank string()
PATCH returns 422 when groupName is provided ahead of schema support()
